programme.title: Salaam E Ishq: A Tribute to Love
programme.desc: According to a famous author, love is not always easy, but it is worth the struggle. Exemplifying this sentiment, six couples burn some bridges and bridge some distances to find their happiness.

programme.title: Welcome
programme.desc: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: A rhythmic exchange of silly pranks and shenanigans begins after a young boy and his family move into a house inhabited by a grumpy old ghost.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: While on a road trip, Meera and Arjun witness an honour killing committed by a powerful gangster, Satbir. However, the latter soon starts pursuing the couple to eliminate them.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer struggles with anger issues that complicate his personal life and relationships. His world takes an unexpected turn when he meets Rani.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of Raju, Shyam and Baburao change completely when they get cheated by a fraudster. Desperate to repay a loan from a feared gangster, they scramble to find an alternative solution.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal gets stuck in a yacht for a night after he saves an attractive young woman. However, his wife, Ekta, suspects him of having an affair and decides to uncover the truth.
